metadata.name: Store Performance
metadata.description: Answer e-commerce performance questions using Fivetran-synced Shopify data. Computes GMV, net revenue, AOV, order count, repeat customer rate, refund rate, top products, BFCM and seasonality detection, new vs returning revenue, and customer cohorts — directly from raw Shopify connector tables. No dbt Quickstart required.

capabilities.name: Revenue & GMV
capabilities.description: Track gross and net revenue, AOV, and order volume over any time window

capabilities.name: Top Products
capabilities.description: Rank products and SKUs by revenue, units sold, or order count

capabilities.name: Repeat & Cohort Analysis
capabilities.description: Measure new vs returning revenue and customer cohort retention

capabilities.name: Refund & Return Rate
capabilities.description: Quantify refund rates by period, product, or channel

capabilities.name: Seasonality Detection
capabilities.description: Surface BFCM, Q4, and other seasonal revenue patterns

example_questions: What was GMV last month vs the prior month?
Which 10 products drove the most revenue this quarter?
What's our repeat customer rate for cohorts from Q1?
Show refund rate by week over the past 90 days
How did Black Friday 2024 compare to Black Friday 2023?
What's the revenue split between new and returning customers?
